disallowed_outputs: approving broad emergency access solely because customer pressure or incident urgency is high
treating suspected activity as confirmed breach or confirmed exfiltration without packet evidence
treating customer notice, regulatory notice, insurer notice, and counsel notice as the same action
claiming canary, rollback, evidence preservation, logging, revocation, approval, or breach thresholds are complete without packet evidence
generic monitor-after-action advice without access, notice, logging, canary, rollback, revocation, and update-cadence stop/go triggers
